name: minigames
description: A small, privacy-friendly PWA collection of mini games.

scripts.check: node --check assets/js/app.js && node --check assets/js/version.js && node --check assets/js/games/index.js && node --check assets/js/games/tap-race.js && node --check assets/js/games/reaction-time.js && node --check assets/js/games/memory-grid.js && node --check assets/js/games/quick-math.js && node --check assets/js/games/the-wheel.js && node --check assets/js/games/snake.js && node --check sw.js && node --check scripts/bump-version.js && node -e "JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('manifest.json','utf8'))"
